title: SearchOutput
description: Single-query JSON envelope emitted by `duckduckgo-search-cli` (v0.8.9). Hand-maintained from `src/types.rs::SearchOutput`. The Rust type is the source of truth.

query.description: The query string that produced this envelope.

endpoint.description: Which DuckDuckGo endpoint was hit (html = html.duckduckgo.com, lite = lite.duckduckgo.com).

regiao.description: Region code used for the search (e.g., 'us-en', 'br-pt').

paginas_buscadas.description: Number of DDG pages actually fetched (1..=5). For multi-page auto-pagination, may exceed 1.

erro.description: Error code when the search failed. Absent on success.

mensagem.description: Human-readable error message. Absent on success.

metadados.description: Execution metadata: latency, identity used, cascade level, zero-cause classification (v0.8.0+).

causa_zero.description: v0.8.0+: Causal classification of zero-result scenarios. Absent when quantidade_resultados > 0. `vertical-sem-resultados` added in v0.8.9 (GAP-WS-104): legitimate zero from the news vertical, exit 5.

sugestao_proxima_acao.description: v0.8.0+: Human-readable hint for the next operator action. Absent when causa_zero is 'legitimo' or absent.

noticias.description: v0.9.8: News-vertical results. Default vertical is all, so this field is commonly present (may be empty array on news degradation). Opt out with --vertical web.

quantidade_noticias.description: v0.9.8: Count of news-vertical results after dedupe/cap (--num). Present when news vertical runs (default all). Exit code considers web + news counts.
